features: Our Radiant Skin Body Wash polishes away little imperfections with gentle exfoliation for radiant skin
Carefully made with 100% natural extracts - Pink Lemon & Mandarin Orange
Our distinctive pink lemons are grown in the sunshine state of California
Gently exfoliates to gently polish away dryness for that clean and cleansed feel

Tell me more! This body wash is dermatologist tested, paraben free, and does not contain animal derived ingredients |This PETA certified cruelty-free body wash is paraben free and dermatologist tested
description: Product description St. Ives Radiant Skin Body Wash Pink Lemon and Mandarin Orange 16 oz All-Natural Exfoliants Cleanse and Moisturize* For soft, sweet-smelling skin, lather up with tropical St. Ives Softening Body Wash Coconut and Orchid. It is made with natural coconut milk and orchid flower extracts*. Our extract comes from coconuts harvested from Caribbean palm trees. The coconut milk is extracted by a water-soaking process. Indian orchid extracts condition skin for irresistible silky smoothness. St. Ives Softening Body Wash Coconut and Orchid contains no animal derived ingredients, contains natural exfoliants*. Ingredients Water (Eau), Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamide Mea, Fragrance (Parfum), Citric Acid, Sodium Benzoate, Tetrasodium Edta, Glycerin, Ppg-9, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Rosa Damascena Flower Extract, Benzyl Alcohol, Citronellol, Geraniol, Hexyl Cinnamal, Limonene, Linalool, Red 33 (Ci 17200), Yellow 5 (Ci 19140) Directions See Label Safety Warning See label See more
